query:
SELECT 
  oc.id, oc.name, 
  FROM_UNIXTIME(oc.lastSyncAt/1000) as last_sync,
  COUNT(ol.id) as total_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ol.discoveredAt >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2026-03-24 00:00:00') * 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as leads_today
FROM outreach_campaigns oc
LEFT JOIN outreach_leads ol ON ol.campaignId = oc.id
GROUP BY oc.id, oc.name, oc.lastSyncAt
ORDER BY oc.id;
command:

SELECT 
  oc.id, oc.name, 
  FROM_UNIXTIME(oc.lastSyncAt/1000) as last_sync,
  COUNT(ol.id) as total_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ol.discoveredAt >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2026-03-24 00:00:00') * 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as leads_today
FROM outreach_campaigns oc
LEFT JOIN outreach_leads ol ON ol.campaignId = oc.id
GROUP BY oc.id, oc.name, oc.lastSyncAt
ORDER BY oc.id;
